creator: nivit@FreeBSD.org
text:
I received an email from Xaizek, who is the author of vifm, and he says that the issues you reported are solved in version 0.13:

"This one [bug] was addressed by

 <https://github.com/vifm/vifm/commit/c7ac111e607bfb0639d905b659470d3f6c886772>

and quickly changed again by

 <https://github.com/vifm/vifm/commit/513c44ed8c7bbf30d081d3dff80dc2aeb22bc03b>

Both commits are part of v0.13, so the bug should be resolved."

So I close this PR.
